summary: Mine Brian Johnson's Areté (book + KB) → design how ALTER cleverly TEACHES + APPLIES the areté protocol (Duolingo-for-life: assess→guide→match→fallbacks→anti-churn), better than Heroic, integrated with the soul-constitution

out.verdict: YES, we can build a Duolingo-for-arete, and the key that lifts it past bare-bones is one inversion the bare-bones version lacks: stop treating ALTER's tools as a MENU and let Johnson's own constraint-ORDER be the routing engine, with a WHO-pole so the Arete Gap is a real distance, not just follow-through. Bare-bones = the app measures whether you showed up. Grand = a guardian that reads how you actually feel THIS morning, reorders the whole day around it unasked, hands the ONE protocol the book says is the only one that can fire right now, and mostly says nothing about it. The cleverness is not more features, it is ORDER + a best-self pole + per-person calibration, all computed offline from data already in S. I re-baselined against the SHIPPED app.js (4729 lines), not the specs: the bookends, the 6-node JOURNEY array, journeyTick() sticky floor, VIRTUE_DECLARATIONS (Johnson-verbatim, already wired to the AM virtue pick), partXTriage() (verbatim Body-Observer-Label-Tool-Higher-force, 5 attack modes routing to shipped Stutz runners), celebrateGated(), amVirtueGlyph(), and currentMood() ALL SHIP TODAY. So most forgotten Arete is not un-built, it is un-WIRED and un-TARGETED. The one falsehood the design must never repeat: readiness() today is a 3-term SCALAR (follow .55 + bkRate .25 + streak .20) returning a bare number, there is NO recovery signal, NO 6-signal vector, NO energy. Every just-surface-SIGNAL-5 / recovery-is-already-weight-.22 claim is false against the code; that is a SPEC, unbuilt. Energy/zest is captured NOWHERE (grep-confirmed). So the honest first wave is small: reuse currentMood() as the energy read (no new quiz), build the energy-first GATE into the journey, extend the scalar readiness() into a recovery+energy profile, TARGET the already-wired Virtue Declaration at the dimmest branch, and AUTO-FIRE the already-shipped partXTriage on detected drift. That chain (energy-read to reorder to name-why-in-one-line to hand-one-shipped-tool) is the whole it-KNEW-me payoff, and it is buildable offline this week.
out.areteSystem: ALTER embodies Arete by becoming Johnson's daily OPERATING PROTOCOL rendered as a guardian, not a checklist. The unifying idea: Arete is not a new system bolted on, it is the CURRICULUM and the ORDERING-LAW the five legs were already built to carry, plus the two things they lack (a WHO-pole and an ORDER). The burning timeline is Objective IV (the day as the unit; each lived block a +1 welded into the metallic past, each drift a quiet -1, Destiny Math made literal, never a visible number). The AM/PM bookends are Objective IV's two hinges and the Sacred Vow's home: the already-wired VIRTUE_DECLARATIONS become the morning's actual words, targeted at the dimmest life-tree branch. The grimoire (with partXTriage already enforcing verbatim body-first ordering) is Objective VI's seven fundamentals as the offline-clever floor and Objective V's self-command. The journey's 6 nodes are the delivery scaffold; the 7 Objectives are the content walked through them. The living world bloom is Objective VII (Soul Force), with Consistency the visible exponent. The soul-layer's three seams (continuity, routing, reward-never-shame) ARE the Gap-closing engine: the angel lives in the seam where it reads your state and hands the one right thing. The single architectural law that makes it not-bare-bones is the ENERGY-FIRST HARD GATE: readiness()'s first signal becomes ENERGY (reusing currentMood(), not a new quiz), and when energy reads low the journey SUPPRESSES every cognitive/identity node and routes only to a fundamentals reset, fix the soil before painting the leaves (master-guide Step 1, verbatim: Do not try to meditate, journal, set intentions... Your body needs repair first). This obeys SOUL Principle 7 (body-first hard ordering) finally wired into the curriculum, and it is the difference between a tool-menu and a guardian: under the gate, only ONE tool can fire, and that constraint IS the cleverness David keeps missing.
assessment: profile(): a PURE cached read beside the SHIPPED scalar readiness() that returns a VECTOR, not a bare number. Locates the user on Johnson's coordinate system, read in fixed order, all from data already in S. Rides the existing S.guide.cache once-per-logical-day discipline; no rAF, no schema bump.

ENERGY-FIRST (the gate, NET-NEW): the first axis, captured by reusing the SHIPPED currentMood() (0-4) as the energy read, NO new quiz, no placement test. Low energy forces every downstream axis to wait. Genuinely unbuilt today (grep: zero energy capture), BUILD it, do not surface it.

THE ARETE GAP (master coordinate): gap = distance between the WHO-pole (best-self, captured once, optional, skippable at Node 4) and current behavior. The scalar readiness() can score follow-through but CANNOT see the gap, no WHO pole exists. Three short best-self statements (Energy/Work/Love) are the biggest forgotten axis. Surfaced only as the warm why sentence + world-bloom, never a number, never red.

RECOVERY SPEED (NET-NEW signal, NOT shipped): of days with a miss, fraction where the next active day had a kept block. Does NOT exist in the 3-term scalar, must be BUILT before it can be celebrated. Then it becomes the headline the angel names (back in 1 day, last time 3; that is the skill), an always-improving stat that can never shame (Equanimity Game, master-guide Step 5).

PER-USER GOLDEN-MEAN CALIBRATION (the Heroic-killer): learn each user's characteristic failure DIRECTION via a per-virtue z-score against THEIR own 30-day mean, then drag in the OTHER direction (PDF p.104 verbatim: YOUR mean will be different than mine). Models EXCESS not only deficiency, so ALTER can tell a grinder to REST/CONNECT, the one assessment Heroic and the deficiency-only readiness() cannot make. Gated behind lowConfidence (activeDays<10); ALWAYS overridden by the energy-first gate.

THE 8-VIRTUE COVERAGE MAP (free read): the SHIPPED VIRTUES array already carries a grow behavior per virtue (zest=move your body, love=reach out, hope=plan tomorrow); tally each against real blocks over 14d to find the starved branch. This data picks the targeted Virtue Declaration and the journey's adaptive domain.

OUTPUT CONTRACT: profile() returns edge:{axis,key,line}, the ONE highest-leverage growth edge. It NEVER shows a number; it speaks one sentence and points one node. Framed as activation heat (you are at 207 degrees climbing, PDF p.41-42), degrees only go up, answering the spec's open question can a node read as a path you can fail with no.
curriculum: Keep the SHIPPED 6-node JOURNEY array as the delivery scaffold (it works, it has the sticky-floor ratchet), change ONLY the DOMAIN each node points at (the spec already says that is the one thing that adapts). Fill it with Johnson's 7 Objectives in his order.
N0 SHOW UP = Objective IV the day is the unit (track one block, embody). Already shipped as done(k).
N1 PLAN SMALL = Objective V the ONE thing I KNOW would most change my life (master-guide / PDF p.54, verbatim), wire as copy for the existing planSheet(tomK) CTA.
N2 THE MORNING = Objective IV AM bookend + the Sacred Vow climax (the TARGETED Virtue Declaration). Already lands in enterStage(am).
N3 REFLECT = Objective II the worse you feel the more committed + the Equanimity Game (celebrate recovery, not streak-unbroken).
N4 IDENTITY = Objective I know the ultimate game (daimon/north-star) + Objective V start with WHO (the WHO-pole capture).
N5 MASTERY = Objective VII Soul Force + the Dojo Decision (turning guidance Off = going for mastery, either-answer-is-fine, non-coercive, matches the shipped N5 this is yours now).

Objective VI (the 7 Fundamentals) is NOT a node, it is the SOIL gate UNDER every node: the energy-first gate routes to a fundamentals reset whenever energy reads low, walking them in Johnson's canonical priority order Sleep > Eating > Moving > Breathing > Focusing > Celebrating > Prospering (master-guide Step 2).

Big 3 = Energy-Work-Love is the ordering law above the 8 domains: never push Work/Love while Energy is low. ATTRIBUTION RESOLVED against the KB: the Energy-Work-Love ORDERING is Johnson's Objective III verbatim (brian-johnson.md:119, must work in this order); the label Big 3 is David's KB-bridge compression, attribute the ordering to Johnson, the heading to David. FLAG: Class-1-vs-Class-2 problems is NOT Johnson (0 hits), never attribute.

Reframe progression as Activation Energy (451/212 degrees, PDF p.41-42): each consistent day adds a degree, the world phase-changes at thresholds, non-shaming XP, never behind, always climbing toward boil.
teachApplyLoop: TEACH = ONE plus-1-degree micro-lesson, never a lecture. The book IS 451 one-degree applied actions (each chapter ends Our plus-1-degree...), so handing ONE obeys Principle 1 by Johnson's own design. Render as TWO warm sentences above the existing journey-node CTA (idea + a single concrete apply), one per logical day, computedK-gated, suppressed at guide=Light/Off, REPLACING the proactive line (never stacking, one voice per phase).
Lessons draw ONLY from confirmed KB/PDF passages; never auto-generate (Principle 2). Robbins transcript + Blair inductions stay DAVID-PENDING, do not write those.

APPLY = the plus-1-degree resolves to a real block via ONLY the SHIPPED safe path (planSheet / nowSheet / enterStage / skeletonDay+reflow), NEVER a new timeline-render write (the 3x-rebuilt regression zone). The wisdom stops being a line and becomes a thing you DID, welded into the metallic past as a +1.

REFLECT = the PM bookend (enterStage(pm)) names what the lesson taught in the user's own day. After an Equanimity-Game lesson + a drift-then-recovery: you drifted, then came back, that bounce IS the skill.

MASTER = the SHIPPED S.tools.use ladder (Willingness<3 / Habit<12 / Grace) already counts completed reps per tool, each applied plus-1-degree increments its Objective's count the same way (no new counter). The world-bloom keys richness off which Objectives have reps, so the garden visibly grows the domain you practiced.

WIN-FIRST DISCIPLINE: prove ONE node carrying ONE plus-1-degree that lands ONE block in a single tap before filling all six. Content authoring (7 Objectives x KB-exact ideas) is the real cost, not the code, one node at a time, or it bloats the cockpit into the lecture surface that is Heroic's exact failure F4.
antiChurn: OVERWHELM to progressive disclosure (shipped intent): proactive() shows ONLY the current node's one action; the energy gate further narrows a low day to a single breath. The reorder itself is the felt it KNEW, no explanation needed.

SHAME-AFTER-LAPSE to the Equanimity Game made visible: BUILD the recovery signal (it does NOT exist yet), then the angel celebrates RECOVERY SPEED by name after any miss, an always-improving stat. A good bad day (showed up small under load) blooms the world MORE than an easy good day. Plus the LEAD/LAG law: readiness() is already a pure lead-measure engine (scores show-up, never outcomes), name it so a bad-luck week never implies the user failed.

NOVELTY-FADE to the named Arambhashura defense (Johnson named the quit-mechanism, SN-009): when engagement drops in the ~2-3 week window, the guardian NAMES it warmly (this is Arambhashura, everyone hits it, you are right on schedule), defusing via Name-It-to-Tame-It, then drops to the FLOOR. DORMANT until David has the data, or it false-fires at a new user.

PLATEAU to love the plateau (Leonard): give the flat stretch between unlocks its own quiet bloom (this is the part the masters love), since the Valley of Disappointment is exactly where Duolingo loses users.

TOO-MUCH-FRICTION to FLOOR vs CEILING + the Motivational Calculator as the silent stall diagnostic (M = Energy x (Expectancy x Value) / (Impulsiveness x Delay)): when a node stalls, infer the broken term from S and hand the ONE matching fix. Energy outside the fraction reinforces the gate. One computed diagnosis, one shipped tool.

LIFE-DISRUPTION to the SHIPPED journeyTick() cold-infer + sticky floor already meets a returning user at true level, never dumped to zero; lead re-entry with the WHO-pole (still becoming their words?).

FALLBACK register needs David's call: SOUL resolved a quiet day reads warm, ONE gentle nudge/day. The antifragile inversion (lean IN when low, master-guide worse you feel more committed) may change only the FRAMING + CTA of the single already-allowed nudge, never its frequency. Add a WOOP obstacle+if-then beat to the PM pre-commit so the fallback is baked into the plan.
beatHeroic: F1 SCORE-IS-THE-GAME to the +1/-1 Destiny Math is a HIDDEN input that only ever blooms the world (shipped game layer); no visible droppable number. Name the timeline's existing metallic-shine (won) vs dim-grey (drift) AS Johnson's points system, it was always rendered as a line, not a counter.

F2 CHECKLIST-NOT-TRANSFORMATION to the next step CHANGES daily because the journey's adaptive domain is gated by readiness/energy/the dimmest virtue, and each node teaches a different Objective. The shipped JOURNEY done(k) already varies the daily action; fill the domain slot with the 7 Objectives.

F3 IT-NEVER-ASSESSES-YOU to profile() assesses continuously and PER-PERSON (golden-mean excess-detection), gated energy-first. The shipped journeyTick() already cold-infers a power user to mastery; profile() adds the WHO-pole + per-virtue read Heroic lacks.

F4 CONTENT-NOT-EQUAL-APP to the teach-apply loop fuses the plus-1-degree INTO the moment: the lesson is the proactive card, the practice is a real timeline block, the reflection is the PM mirror. The book never lives in a separate tab you READ.

F5 SHAME-ON-MISS to reward-never-shame is structural (the SHIPPED sticky-floor ratchet never demotes), recovery becomes the headline (once built), Part X names the adversary (partXTriage SHIPS, wire it to auto-fire on drift), and the design-flaw reframe turns a slip into a setup problem to fix, not a willpower verdict.

THE DEEPEST BEAT: Heroic narrates psychology AT you; ALTER mostly DOES the right thing silently. Lead with the wordless reorder (low-energy morning to cognitive asks already suppressed, one breath surfaced, it just KNEW). Named-mechanic copy is the AI-ceiling lubricant (Principle 5), never the product, over-narration is the competent but soulless trap David killed (#216).
forgotten: 1. THE WHO-POLE / daimon north-star (highest leverage). The app answers did you run your protocol but never which GAME are you playing (Objective I, the book's FIRST objective; daimon = eu+daimon, KB L106/L213). Without a best-self pole the Arete Gap is unmeasurable. ONE rarely-edited daimon sentence = the life-tree's missing trunk (8 branches, no center). Also the answer to help me do GRAND stuff, personalization without a center is a smarter to-do list.

2. THE ENERGY-FIRST GATE (genuinely un-built; grep-confirmed zero energy capture). Johnson's #1 non-skippable constraint (master-guide Step 1, verbatim). Reuse currentMood() so it is one tap, not a quiz. The single biggest bare-bones fix.

3. GOLDEN-MEAN EXCESS-MODELING (the Heroic-killer). Both shipped readiness() and Heroic model only deficiency (do more). Johnson insists on the vice of EXCESS too (PDF p.104). You have been all Discipline this week, today rest/connect is the most differentiated it knows me lever.

4. RECOVERY-SPEED as a real signal (un-built, readiness() is a 3-term scalar with no recovery term). The Equanimity Game (master-guide Step 5). Must be built before celebrated; turns the most churn-prone moment into the most-rewarded.

5. CONSISTENCY-OVER-INTENSITY made VISIBLE. Soul Force = (Energy x Focus x WIN)^Consistency; ^0 collapses to 1 (PDF p.939). Make a flat consistent line out-bloom a spiky one in the world layer, teach the math through the world itself.

6. THE TWO FORGOTTEN FUNDAMENTALS: CELEBRATING (the Velcro/Teflon 20-30s savoring HOLD on the shipped celebrateGated(), the neuroscience root of reward-never-shame, SN-242) and PROSPERING (create-not-compete). The grimoire ships ~5 of 7 fundamentals; these two are the clearest gaps.
7. ARAMBHASHURA + LOVE-THE-PLATEAU as named churn defenses (SN-009 / Leonard), Johnson named the quit-mechanism; ALTER has not built the named defense.
8. THE MOTIVATIONAL CALCULATOR as the intelligent fallback (master-guide Step 9, SN-246), a ready-made stall diagnostic for the brief's explicit fallback ask.

9. THE 9-SECOND TARGETED-THINKING cognitive runner (PDF p.252, the chicken-poop example), a fast neutral-not-positive reframe; the shipped runners are all body/state tools, none is a cognitive-to-neutral reframe.
10. CONTRIBUTION / for whom (strength-for-two), the LOVE axis the locked intrinsic-only why-chips exclude; Johnson's highest motivational tier. A real tension, not a silent add.
integration: LEG 1 (burning timeline): name the SHIPPED metallic-past / dim-grey render AS Destiny Math +1/-1, a pure-READ interpretation feeding readiness()/world-bloom. ZERO new render path on the timeline (3x-rebuilt regression zone). Block placement only via the shipped safe path (skeletonDay/blocks.push/reflow).

LEG 2 (AM/PM bookends, enterStage am/pm, SHIPPED): wire the energy read as the first beat of the AM stage (reuse currentMood()); make the AM virtue climax TARGET the dimmest branch (VIRTUE_DECLARATIONS already wired at app.js:1479, just untargeted); add the WHO-pole + optional daimon at Node 4; add a WOOP obstacle+if-then beat to the PM pre-commit. amVirtueGlyph() (shipped, app.js:1934) already votes each kept block toward the declared virtue.

LEG 3 (grimoire + partXTriage, SHIPPED): partXTriage() already enforces verbatim body-first ordering and routes 5 attack modes to the shipped Stutz runners, the novel move is AUTO-FIRING it from proactive() on detected drift (today it is a manual SOS + a passive once/day drift chip via avoidedBlock()). Re-taxonomize the shipped runners under the 7 fundamentals as the energy-gate's fallback ladder. Add the 9-second Targeted-Thinking runner + Celebrating savoring-hold + Prospering as fast-follows.

LEG 4 (journey/life-tree, SHIPPED 6-node array + journeyTick sticky floor): fill the adaptive DOMAIN slot with the 7 Objectives; add the daimon as the tree's trunk; render Consistency as the exponent that out-blooms intensity.

LEG 5 (world/angel): the bloom IS Soul Force (Objective VII); static-repaint only (DAY-ARC idiom), never an rAF loop near the timeline recenter watcher; DEVICE-UNTESTED until David confirms on iPhone.
COCKPIT: every teach/apply/reflect beat renders into the SHIPPED enterStage/renderStage(tool|am|pm), never a third menu.

SOUL-LAYER (the seams): CONTINUITY = the shipped S.bk baton; ROUTING = profile() picking the ONE edge + partXTriage auto-fire; REWARD-NEVER-SHAME = the shipped sticky-floor ratchet + celebrateGated GENTLE tier + the (to-build) recovery signal as a structural lead-measure. Wire all three and it feels like one mind.
STATE: everything rides S.guide / S.bk / S.tools as additive fields (the shipped no-schema-bump precedent); every read guards (S.guide-or-empty).
firstMoves: 1. ENERGY READ via currentMood() (REUSE, do NOT add a quiz): store the morning energy as the first beat of the shipped enterStage(am); infer from last-night sleep block when untapped. Net-new but tiny. Copy honors reward-never-shame (body first, one breath, then we go), never a locked door.

2. EXTEND readiness() from the 3-term scalar to a profile() vector: add the RECOVERY and ENERGY signals FIRST (these do NOT exist today, build, do not surface). Pure cached read on the shipped S.guide.cache once-per-logical-day path; guard every S.bk read.

3. THE ENERGY-FIRST GATE in journeyNode()/proactive(): when energy is low, suppress cognitive/identity nodes and route to a shipped body runner. This is the chain's payoff, the silent reorder that KNEW.
4. TARGET the already-wired Virtue Declaration at the dimmest branch (use the free VIRTUES grow tally), the Sacred Vow climax with zero new surface.

5. AUTO-FIRE the SHIPPED partXTriage() from proactive() on detected drift (it already routes correctly; it just needs a state trigger), the first proactive trigger-tool hand-off, answering SOUL's open question.
6. NAME recovery in the angel's voice (the Equanimity Game) once the signal exists.

THEN, one leg at a time as DEPTH (not first wave): the WHO-pole + daimon trunk; golden-mean excess-calibration (gated lowConfidence, energy-gate always wins); the plus-1-degree teach-card proven end-to-end on ONE node; the Velcro/Teflon savoring-hold on celebrateGated(); Arambhashura/plateau (dormant until real data); the Motivational Calculator fallback.

GUARDRAIL on every move: never touch the timeline render; label world-bloom/savoring-hold DEVICE-UNTESTED until David's iPhone confirms; run the reward-never-shame lint; build in the real app on the locked berry palette.
openQuestions: 1. REGISTER CALL (David decides, do not default): SOUL resolved a quiet day reads warm, at most ONE gentle nudge/day. Johnson's antifragile inversion (the worse you feel, the more committed) wants the guardian to lean IN on a low day. Safe version: the inversion changes only the FRAMING + CTA of the single already-allowed nudge, never its frequency. Bless or veto?

2. CONTRIBUTION vs INTRINSIC-ONLY (locked tension): the why-chips exclude other-directed reasons, but Johnson puts contribution (strength for two) at the highest motivational tier. Add a SEPARATE optional non-coercive for-whom beat, or keep intrinsic-only locked? (The mentor/SHARE endpoint is an INVENTION from SN-240 and breaks offline-single-file, out of scope unless you bless a backend.)

3. ENERGY-GATE THRESHOLD: where is low on the currentMood() 0-4 scale? Tune against your REAL 14-day export, never synthetic. And does hard suppression of journaling on a tired day read as care or as a wall? Confirm on your phone.

4. GOLDEN-MEAN EXCESS as headline or fast-follow? Most differentiated idea (telling a grinder to rest, the one thing Heroic cannot do) AND hardest to get right (cold-start noise; never fire while energy is low). Commit as headline, or cut cleanly?

5. WHO-POLE / daimon scope: one optional skippable sentence at Node 4, or a richer 3-statement (Energy/Work/Love) capture? Must work fully degraded when skipped (gap axis falls back to follow-through-only, lowConfidence).

6. LIFE-STATE TWIN (#8, your earliest concrete vision) is entirely absent from this Arete pass. For grand, life-changing, a guardian that remembers your laundry is overdue may beat any Soul Force visualization. In or deferred? (Flagging, not silently dropping, per SOUL.)

7. SOURCING HONESTY: a few page-exact quotes (Soul Oxygen p.63, Destiny Math p.65, Targeted-Thinking p.252) come from KB synthesis; I verified the spine (energy gate, Soul Force eq, 8 Declarations, Big-3 ordering) verbatim in the KB this session but did not re-render those exact PDF pages. Re-pull before any go into shipped copy.
